
=== FF3 Enemy Sprite Dump Session ===

(label this dump with the enemy name after you see it)

=== FF3 Enemy Sprite Dump Session ===
Enemies: Carbuncle ($01), Eye Fang ($02), Blue Wisp ($03)

=== Dump #1 ===
(label this dump with the enemy name after you see it)

-- BG Palettes ($3F00-$3F0F):
  pal0: $0F $12 $22 $3B
  pal1: $0F $15 $22 $37
  pal2: $0F $27 $17 $07
  pal3: $0F $00 $01 $30

-- Nametable scan (rows 3-13, cols 1-14) — non-zero tiles:
  row03: 6B 68 69 68 69 6A 6B 6A 6B 68 69 68 69 6A 6B 6A 6B
  row04: 6F 6C 6D 6C 6D 6E 6F 6E 6F 6C 6D 6C 6D 6E 6F 6E 6F
  row05: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
  row06: 00 00 00 70 71 72 73 B8 B9 BA BB DC DD DE DF DC DD
  row07: 00 00 00 74 75 76 77 BC BD BE BF E0 E1 E2 E3 E0 E1
  row08: 00 00 00 78 79 7A 7B C0 C1 C2 C3 E4 E5 E6 E7 E4 E5
  row09: 00 00 00 7C 7D 7E 7F C4 C5 C6 C7 E8 E9 EA EB E8 E9
  row10: 00 00 00 80 81 82 83 C8 C9 CA CB EC ED EE EF EC ED
  row11: 00 00 00 84 85 86 87 CC CD CE CF F0 F1 F2 F3 F0 F1
  row12: 00 00 00 70 71 72 73 B8 B9 BA BB DC DD DE DF 00 00
  row13: 00 00 00 74 75 76 77 BC BD BE BF E0 E1 E2 E3 00 00
